name: Operation

phase_0.boundary_condition: The 9-foot Magic Circle with divine names at the quarters, containing the operator and separating the profane space.

VINIT.justification: The void before the ritual, ordinary consciousness before anything is named or invoked.

TANCH.justification: The terminal anchor, the 9-foot boundary that contains the whole system and protects the operator from the profane.

AFWD.justification: Forward morphism, the preparation of instruments and self, moving into the operational state.

AREV.justification: Reverse/descent transformation, clearing the space and returning from the operational state to the ordinary.

CLINK.justification: Composition, the ordered chaining of purification, invocation, and binding.

IMSCRIB.justification: Identity, self-reference, the operator recognizing their own authority and the text reading itself.

FSPLIT.justification: Co-multiplication, the spoken word splits the operational intent into the Invocation (the call) and the Constraint (the binding).

FFUSE.justification: Multiplication, the spirit is released, the boundaries are dissolved, reconstituting the closed ritual loop.

EVALT.justification: True/affirmative branch, the spirit appears in the triangle and obeys the operator's demands.

EVALF.justification: False/negative branch, the spirit does not appear or resists the constraint, requiring the anathema.

ENGAGR.justification: A paradice: the seal that summons is simultaneously the seal that banishes, μ∘δ = id held without resolution.

IFIX.justification: ROM fixation, the permanent inscription of the seal on parchment and the ritual's outcome in the text.

phase_3.void_description: 00 — The uninitiated state, ordinary consciousness before the circle is drawn, no operational space exists.
phase_3.true_description: 01 — The spirit has manifested and obeyed, the operational intent is affirmed and realized.
phase_3.false_description: 10 — The spirit has refused or the conjuration failed, the operational intent is negated or resisted.
phase_3.both_description: 11 — The Frobenius paradox held: the seal that summons is the seal that banishes, both creation and dissolution exist simultaneously in the operator's mind.

steps.domain_action: The uninitiated void, the operator in ordinary consciousness before the ritual begins.
The Magic Circle is drawn, establishing the 9-foot boundary that contains and protects the system.
Consecration of instruments and self, moving forward into the operational state.
The Operator's Will asserts itself, recognizing its own authority and identity as the magician.
The sequential ritual steps are chained: purification, incense, prayer, and preparation.
The Conjuration is spoken, splitting the operational intent into the Invocation and the Constraint.
The Spirit Manifests in the triangle, appearing and obeying the operator's demands (T-arm success).
The Spirit Refuses or resists, the conjuration fails to compel the entity (F-arm failure).
The License to Depart is granted, the spirit is released, and the ritual loop is closed, reconstituting the Completed Magical Operation.
The Grimoire's Paradox is held: the seal that summons is simultaneously the seal that banishes, μ∘δ = id.
Banishing and clearing the space, the descent from the operational state back toward the ordinary.
The Grimoire Record is inscribed, the permanent fixation of the seal and the ritual's outcome in the text.

phase_5.compiler_frontend: The Grimoire Text — translates the operator's intentions into the structural grammar of the ritual.
phase_5.ipc_mechanism: The Spoken Word and Sigils — the vibrational and visual communication between operator and spirit.
phase_5.memory_mechanism: The Operator's Consciousness and the Grimoire's Pages — storing the ritual's structure and past invocations.
phase_5.scheduler_mechanism: Planetary Hours and Lunar Phases — the astrological timing that determines when the operation can proceed.
phase_5.alfs_store: The Ur-Template (Testament of Solomon) — the canonical bootstrap store from which all grimoires degrade.

phase_6.cycle_cost: The operator's intentional coherence and spiritual authority, consumed to maintain the boundary and compel the spirit.
phase_6.pre_cycle_state: The uninitiated operator in ordinary consciousness, the void before the ritual.
phase_6.post_cycle_state: The transformed operator, having closed the loop, inscribed the record, and returned to the ordinary world.
phase_6.delta_s_verdict: ΔS ≈ 0 — The ritual is a Frobenius-closed loop; the energy expended to summon is exactly balanced by the energy released in the license to depart, conserving the operator's spiritual state.

lean_scaffold:
-- IGProtocol scaffold: VINIT → TANCH → AFWD → IMSCRIB → CLINK → FSPLIT → EVALT → EVALF → FFUSE → ENGAGR → AREV → IFIX
-- Class: Operation
-- Fingerprint: sig=(6,2,3,1)
--   self_ref=False | frobenius_order=1
--   dialetheia_complete=True | period=12
-- Expected tier: O₂
-- FSPLIT/FFUSE pairs: [(5, 8)]

import Imscribing.IGMorphism
import Imscribing.IGFunctor

namespace Imscribing
open Primitives Frobenius IGProtocol
open Dimensionality Topology Relational Polarity Grammar
     Fidelity KineticChar Granularity Criticality Protection Stoichiometry Chirality

-- ── Token → IG field mapping ──────────────────────────────────────────────
--   [0] VINIT     dim    := 𐑼               𐑼 → 𐑡  | initial object — ground of distinction
--   [1] TANCH     top    := 𐑡               𐑼 → 𐑾  | terminal object — connectivity boundary
--   [2] AFWD      rel    := 𐑾               𐑡 → 𐑠  | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow
--   [3] IMSCRIB   gram   := 𐑠               𐑾 → 𐑱  | identity — self-imscription
--   [4] CLINK     fid    := 𐑱               𐑠 → 𐑚  | composition — regime coherence
--   [5] FSPLIT    gran   := 𐑚               𐑚 → 𐑚  | split δ — range decomposition
--   [6] EVALT     crit   := ⊙               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-true — criticality gate open
--   [7] EVALF     chir   := 𐑖               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-false — chirality check
--   [8] FFUSE     stoi   := 𐑙               𐑙 → 𐑳  | fuse μ — assembly mode
--   [9] ENGAGR    stoi   := 𐑳               𐑙 → 𐑗  | engage paradox — B-state, both arms
--   [10] AREV      pol    := 𐑗               𐑳 → 𐑭  | reverse morphism — parity flip
--   [11] IFIX      prot   := 𐑭               𐑗 → 𐑼  | irreversible fixation — winding number

-- ── Main IGProtocol term ────────────────────────────────────────────────────

noncomputable def operation_protocol : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑭 :=
  .withGram 𐑠 <|
  -- Seq chain:
  (.arrow 𐑼 𐑼 𐑡)  -- [0] VINIT | dim := 𐑼 | initial object — ground of distinction (The uninitiated void, the operator in ordinary consciousness before the ritua...)
  (.arrow 𐑡 𐑼 𐑾)  -- [1] TANCH | top := 𐑡 | terminal object — connectivity boundary (The Magic Circle is drawn, establishing the 9-foot boundary that contains and...)
  (.arrow 𐑾 𐑡 𐑠)  -- [2] AFWD | rel := 𐑾 | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow (Consecration of instruments and self, moving forward into the operational state.)
  (.arrow 𐑠 𐑾 𐑱)  -- [3] IMSCRIB | gram := 𐑠 | identity — self-imscription (The Operator's Will asserts itself, recognizing its own authority and identit...)
  (.arrow 𐑱 𐑠 𐑚)  -- [4] CLINK | fid := 𐑱 | composition — regime coherence (The sequential ritual steps are chained: purification, incense, prayer, and p...)
  -- FSPLIT [5] (gran := 𐑚) (The Conjuration is spoken, splitting the operational intent into the Invocation and the Constraint.) / FFUSE [8] (stoi := 𐑙)
  .seq
    (.prod
      -- T-branch (1 nodes)
      (.arrow ⊙ 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [6] EVALT | crit := ⊙ | evaluate-true — criticality gate open (The Spirit Manifests in the triangle, appearing and obeying the operator's de...)
      -- F-branch (1 nodes)
      (.arrow 𐑖 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [7] EVALF | chir := 𐑖 | evaluate-false — chirality check (The Spirit Refuses or resists, the conjuration fails to compel the entity (F-...))
    -- reconnect at FFUSE [8]: μ closes the Frobenius pair
    (.arrow 𐑙 𐑙 𐑳)  -- [8] FFUSE | stoi := 𐑙 (The License to Depart is granted, the spirit is released, and the ritual loop is closed, reconstituting the Completed Magical Operation.)
  (.arrow 𐑳 𐑙 𐑗)  -- [9] ENGAGR | stoi := 𐑳 | engage paradox — B-state, both arms (The Grimoire's Paradox is held: the seal that summons is simultaneously the s...)
  (.arrow 𐑗 𐑳 𐑭)  -- [10] AREV | pol := 𐑗 | reverse morphism — parity flip (Banishing and clearing the space, the descent from the operational state back...)
  (.arrow 𐑭 𐑗 𐑼)  -- [11] IFIX | prot := 𐑭 | irreversible fixation — winding number (The Grimoire Record is inscribed, the permanent fixation of the seal and the ...)

-- ── Evaluation arm sub-defs ─────────────────────────────────────────────────

-- truth arm
noncomputable def operation_true_arm : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑭 :=
  (operation_protocol).restrictToEVALT

-- false arm
noncomputable def operation_false_arm : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑭 :=
  (operation_protocol).restrictToEVALF

-- ── Verification theorems ───────────────────────────────────────────────────

theorem operation_tier : TierFunctor.obj 𐑼 = .O₂ := by decide

-- Frobenius (split → fuse): μ∘δ = id on .prod branch
-- Proof: apply igFrobAlg_self_fusion; exact mu_delta_A_id
-- (requires mu_delta_A_id from IGFunctor library)

end Imscribing
